name: codex-obsidian-mcp
description: Expose an Obsidian vault to Codex and other MCP clients through a configurable local MCP bridge.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to your local Obsidian vault
interface.longDescription: Adds a configurable Codex MCP bridge for the local HTTP or HTTPS endpoint exposed by the Codex Obsidian MCP Obsidian plugin. Start Obsidian, enable the plugin, then configure OBSIDIAN_MCP_URL or OBSIDIAN_MCP_PROTOCOL/HOST/PORT/PATH plus OBSIDIAN_MCP_API_KEY.
defaultPrompt: Draft edits for a vault note
